creator: romain@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Is it possible for you to try the version of monodevelop in the BSD#
repo and confirm it does work:

http://code.google.com/p/bsd-sharp/source/browse/trunk/devel/monodevelop/?r=1245

I compiled it with the latests mono version without error but there are
a few issues that have to be fixed before it can reach the FreeBSD ports
tree.

Thanks!

-- 
Romain Tartière <romain@FreeBSD.org>  http://people.FreeBSD.org/~romain/
pgp: 8234 9A78 E7C0 B807 0B59  80FF BA4D 1D95 5112 336F (ID: 0x5112336F)
(plain text =non-HTML= PGP/GPG encrypted/signed e-mail much appreciated)
